languages.text: "Приветствую. Устранение неисправностей?" {n}Больше половины визоров Ферренца удалена из-за громоздкого нейроимпланта, впаянного в его голову. Оставшиеся медленно и несколько рассредоточено загораются при вашем появлении.{/n}

"Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Приветствую. Устранение неисправностей?" {n}Больше половины визоров Ферренца удалена из-за громоздкого нейроимпланта, впаянного в его голову. Оставшиеся медленно и несколько рассредоточено загораются при вашем появлении.{/n}

"Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

languages.text: 「挨拶。故障修正？」{n}フェレンツのバイザーは、頭部に接続された面倒な神経増設装置のために、半分以上が取り外されている。残りのバイザーは、あなたの出現に遅く、ぼんやりと光る。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「挨拶。故障修正？」{n}フェレンツのvisorは、頭部に接続された面倒な神経増設装置のために、半分以上が取り外されている。残りのvisorは、あなたの出現に遅く、ぼんやりと光る。{/n}

languages.text: "Selamlar. Hata düzeltme mi olacaktı?" {n}Ferrenz'in vizörlerinin yarısından çoğu, kafasına lehimlenmiş hantal nöral implant yüzünden çıkarılmış. Kalan vizörlerse seni görününce yavaş ve gelişigüzel bir şekilde yanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Selamlar. Hata düzeltme mi olacaktı?" {n}Ferrenz'in vizörlerinin yarısından çoğu, kafasına lehimlenmiş hantal nöral implant yüzünden çıkarılmış. Kalan vizörlerse seni görününce yavaş ve gelişigüzel bir şekilde yanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Saludos. ¿Corrección de defectos?». {n}Ferrenz se ha quitado más de la mitad de los visores de para hacer hueco al voluminoso implante neuronal soldado a su cabeza. Los visores restantes se iluminan ante tu presencia de forma lenta e inconsistente.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Saludos. ¿Corrección de defectos?». {n}Ferrenz se ha quitado más de la mitad de los visores de para hacer hueco al voluminoso implante neuronal soldado a su cabeza. Los visores restantes se iluminan ante tu presencia de forma lenta e inconsistente.{/n}

languages.text: “您好，故障修正？”{n}由于头部焊了个笨重的神经植入物，费伦茨身上大半的目镜已被移除。剩下的目镜见你出现，这才懒洋洋地亮起。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您好，故障修正？”{n}由于头部焊了个笨重的神经植入物，费伦茨身上大半的目镜已被移除。剩下的目镜见你出现，这才懒洋洋地亮起。{/n}

languages.text: « Bonjour. Correction des déficiences ? » {n}Plus de la moitié des visières de Ferrenz lui ont été retirées pour faire place à l'implant neuronal encombrant soudé sur sa tête. Celles qui restent s'illuminent lentement à votre arrivée, d'une manière qui semble désordonnée.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Bonjour. Correction des déficiences ? » {n}Plus de la moitié des visières de Ferrenz lui ont été retirées pour faire place à l'implant neuronal encombrant soudé sur sa tête. Celles qui restent s'illuminent lentement à votre arrivée, d'une manière qui semble désordonnée.{/n}

languages.text: "Seid gegrüßt! Fehlerkorrektur?" {n}Mehr als die Hälfte von Ferrenz' Visoren wurde wegen des unbequemen neuralen Implantats entfernt, das in seinen Kopf gelötet wurde. Die verbliebenen Visoren leuchten bei deinem Erscheinen langsam und planlos auf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Greetings. Fault correction?" {n}More than half of Ferrenz's visors have been removed due to the cumbersome neural implant soldered into his head. The remaining visors light up at your appearance in a slow and desultory manner.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Seid gegrüßt! Fehlerkorrektur?" {n}Mehr als die Hälfte von Ferrenz' Visoren wurde wegen des unbequemen neuralen Implantats entfernt, das in seinen Kopf gelötet wurde. Die verbliebenen Visoren leuchten bei deinem Erscheinen langsam und planlos auf.{/n}
